name: Rhode Island Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Rhode Island - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description: Rhode Island Department of Health, Office of Health Professionals Regulation, 3 Capitol Hill, Room 104, Providence, RI 02908-5097

renewalCycle: Every 2 years (expires Nov 1 of odd years) + 20 CE hours

requiredDocuments.name: Notarized Application & Photo
requiredDocuments.description: Application form with a notarized signature and a recent 2x3 head-and-shoulders photograph.

requiredDocuments.name: CDR Registration Verification
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of active registration sent directly from the CDR to the Board.

requiredDocuments.name: Criminal Background Check
requiredDocuments.description: An original BCI report from the Rhode Island Attorney General's Office.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a Rhode Island dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The initial cost is a $75 application fee, which does not include the cost of the BCI background check.

mainEntity.name: When does the Rhode Island license need to be renewed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rhode Island LDN licenses expire on November 1st of odd-numbered years. The biennial renewal fee is $170.

mainEntity.name: Does Rhode Island use the title 'Nutritionist'?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Rhode Island uses the combined title of Licensed Dietitian/Nutritionist (LDN) to license both professionals under one standard for medical nutrition therapy.

mainEntity.name: Does Rhode Island have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Rhode Island. To work in Rhode Island, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Rhode Island?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 3 to 5 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Rhode Island while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
